composer_decisions.reason: structured use-case fit allowed per policy

specialist_capabilities: Strong CPU performance: 14-core Intel Core i7-13700H suited for multi-threaded workloads (compilation, virtualization, heavy multitasking).
Large local storage: 2048 GB SSD provides ample space for projects, media libraries, and local VMs.
High-resolution 16.0" display (3456×2234): excellent pixel density for detailed work and document/asset layout (panel type and color gamut not specified).
Memory: 16 GB RAM adequate for web development, office productivity, light photo editing, and typical multitasking; limits heavy video-editing, large datasets, or large VM fleets.
Portability class: at 4.48 lb (~2.03 kg) this is a desktop-replacement class machine — less convenient for frequent air travel or long commutes.
Battery: up to 6 hours quoted — moderate real-world endurance for mixed use; expect shorter runtimes under CPU/GPU load.
OS: Windows 11 Pro — enterprise features useful for business deployments and corporate security policies.
GPU note: product lists an 'Apple Integrated GPU', an unusual combination with an Intel CPU on an HP laptop; this may indicate atypical driver/support implications on Windows.

specialist_audience.professionals: Powerful 14-core CPU, large SSD, and Windows 11 Pro make it well suited for office and enterprise workflows.
specialist_audience.developers: Strong multi-core CPU and 2 TB storage support large codebases and local containers; 16 GB RAM may be a constraint for heavy parallel builds or many VMs.
specialist_audience.creators: High-resolution screen and large storage help photo and light video work, but unknown panel calibration and unclear GPU capabilities limit high-end GPU-accelerated rendering.
specialist_audience.students: Good CPU and storage for coursework and projects, but weight and 6-hour battery life reduce suitability for all-day campus use.
specialist_audience.power_users: Big SSD and a 14-core i7 support intensive multitasking and local media libraries, though 16 GB RAM limits some advanced workflows.
